message:
fix(dashboard): set correct Dolt port for bd subprocesses (#2259)

gt dashboard spawns bd/gt subprocesses that inherit the process
environment. If BEADS_DOLT_PORT or GT_DOLT_PORT is set to the
dashboard HTTP listen port instead of the Dolt SQL port, bd
connects to the wrong server.

Read the actual Dolt port from daemon/dolt-state.json at dashboard
startup and set both env vars explicitly. Falls back to default
port 3307 if dolt-state.json is missing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
